steps.title: Identify roots from the factored form
Use the given point to set up an equation in p
steps.content: Since $(-4,0)$ is a zero and $-4\ne 3,5$, we need $-4+p=0$, so $p=4$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice D — $120$, $120$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D.
